properties.query: filter interfaceId like 'eni-' | stats sum(bytes) as bytes by srcAddr | sort bytes desc | limit 10
properties.title: Top Source IPs by Outbound Traffic

properties.query: filter interfaceId like 'eni-' and action='REJECT' | stats count(*) as rejected by srcAddr | sort rejected desc | limit 10
properties.title: Top Source IPs by Rejected Connections

properties.query: filter interfaceId like 'eni-' and action='ACCEPT' | stats sum(bytes) as bytes by dstAddr | sort bytes desc | limit 10
properties.title: Top Destination IPs by Accepted Traffic

properties.query: filter interfaceId like 'eni-' | stats count(*) as connections by action | sort connections desc
properties.title: Connection Summary by Action

invariants: Dashboard must include CloudWatch Logs Insights widgets for NAT Gateway VPC flow logs
Queries must filter by interfaceId like 'eni-' to target NAT Gateway ENIs
Dashboard should provide visibility into both traffic volume and security events
